subtopic: Types of Orders and Trading Strategies
title: Types of Orders and Trading Strategies: A trader enters a short futures position. If the market...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: A trader enters a short futures position. If the market price rises, what is the potential outcome?

options.text: If the market price rises, the trader in a short futures position will incur

solution: If the market price rises, the trader in a short futures position will incur losses, which can be unlimited if the price keeps rising.
